title: Mobs Origins Datapack
description: 15 Mobs from Minecraft, Made as Origins
body:
In this mod I tried to copy, as closely as possible, 15 of the mobs from Minecraft into origins. currently there is:
  • bee
  • blaze
  • creeper
  • enderman
  • evoker
  • ghast
  • phantom
  • pufferfish
  • shulker
  • skeleton
  • slime
  • spider
  • strider
  • villager
  • zombie
To become any of the following 4 you will need to craft a special orb, and throw it onto the ground at your feet along with a diamond.
  • Wither
  • Warden
  • Ender Dragon
  • Ravager
To become this origin you must throw all prior crafted orbs onto the ground together. End game master Works Server-Side
